devices_subtitle: Create and manage Android Virtual Devices
devices_empty_desc: Create your first Android Virtual Device. Make sure all SDK components are installed first.
sdk_subtitle: Install Android system images, emulator, and platform tools
gpu_subtitle: Configure GPU acceleration and virtualization for maximum performance
setup_subtitle: Download required components to run the Android emulator
setup_warn: All components are downloaded from official Google and Eclipse Temurin servers. Stored locally in android-sdk/ — no global installs.
settings_subtitle: Manage localization, interface options, and emulator defaults
settings_emoji_desc: Show emojis in sidebar, headers, and logs
settings_logcapture_desc: Automatically capture guest console logs on boot
logs_subtitle: Live output from SDK operations and emulators
logs_paused_warn: Log capture is paused. New emulator output is being discarded. Click Paused to resume.
logs_empty: No emulator log output yet. Launch a device to see its log here.
